message:
feat(abi): promote networks database family from host delegation to native

Replace 8 host-delegated symbols with native implementations:
- setnetent/endnetent/getnetent — thread-local /etc/networks iterator
- getnetbyname/getnetbyaddr — file-scanning lookups
- getnetent_r/getnetbyname_r/getnetbyaddr_r — reentrant variants with
  caller-supplied buffers

Host delegation count in unistd_abi.rs: 29 → 21

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
